title: Attempt Test Case Generation Without Selecting a Requirement
description: Verify that submitting the form with a template selected but no requirement chosen triggers a specific error for the missing requirement field.
expected_result: System shows a specific error only on the requirement field and does not proceed with generation. The template field shows no error since it was correctly filled.

test_steps.action: Navigate to the test case generation page
test_steps.expected: Test case generation page is displayed

test_steps.action: Select a template from the template dropdown
Leave the requirement selector empty and click Generate Test Cases
test_steps.expected: Form submission is blocked with an error on the requirement field

test_steps.action: Verify error message content for the requirement field
test_steps.expected: Error reads 'Please select at least one requirement'

assertion.value: Please select at least one requirement

test_steps.action: Confirm no template error is shown (template was correctly provided)
test_steps.expected: Template field error is not visible
